name: Arepas Jenesanences (Corn Bread Jenesanen Sty
recipeInstructions:
1. Knead the dough with egg yolks and butter until smooth.
2. Add the grated Muenster cheese and mix until well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into 4-inch discs.
4. Cook on a lightly greased griddle until crusty on both sides.
5. Serve hot, spreading butter over the surface.
6. Optionally, place 1 tablespoon of grated cheese between two thin rounds of dough before cooking.
